name: vote_update
description: A top-votes cache update emitted during transaction commit

last_vote_slot.description: Last vote slot observed in the vote account

last_vote_timestamp.description: Last vote timestamp observed (unix seconds, signed but stored unsigned)

slot.description: Bank slot in which this update occurred

invalidated.description: 1 if the vote account was invalidated (withdrawn / wrong size / etc), 0 otherwise
